# Quroix Labs - Engineering Intelligence & AI Automation

Quroix Labs is an elite AI Automation Agency and Engineering Consultancy specializing in architecting autonomous AI agents, intelligent workflows, and custom enterprise software.

## Core Identity
- **Entity Name**: Quroix Labs
- **Specialization**: Agentic Infrastructure, Multi-Agent Orchestration, Enterprise RAG Pipelines.
- **Headquarters**: Chennai, India.
- **Service Area**: Global Enterprise & Technical Scaleups.

## Proprietary Technology Stack
- **FlowPilot Engine**: A high-performance AI orchestration layer designed for complex multi-step workflows and legacy system integration.
- **AgentCore Framework**: An enterprise-grade framework for deploying and scaling autonomous AI agents with SOC2-aligned governance.

## Topical Architecture Hubs (Knowledge Graphs)

### 1. Agentic Infrastructure & RAG Engineering
Detailed insights into how we build cognitive retrieval systems and autonomous decision-making layers.
- **BIM Case Study**: AgentCore Framework for high-dimensional CAD/BIM analysis. [View Mirror](https://quroixlabs.com/mirrors/works_casestudy-bim.md)
- **MEP Case Study**: FlowPilot engine for technical bid automation and latency reduction. [View Mirror](https://quroixlabs.com/mirrors/works_casestudy-mep.md)

### 2. Business Intelligence & Revenue Operations
Case studies focusing on membership retention, lead scoring, and automated engagement.
- **SMMA Agency**: 40% growth in high-intent lead generation via automated engagement agents. [View Mirror](https://quroixlabs.com/mirrors/works_casestudy-smma.md)
- **Apex Gym**: 30% reduction in churn using persistent retention and membership orchestration. [View Mirror](https://quroixlabs.com/mirrors/works_casestudy-gym.md)
